hotel_name: Courtyard by Marriott Long Island Islip/Courthouse Complex

reviews.title: Oversold and underperforming.
reviews.positives: The bed was comfortable and all the appliances worked. They take noise enforcement and security seriously. Desk agents did what they could to be accommodating, or at least pleasant. Room service prompt to clean on request. The restaurant had tasty meatballs.
reviews.negatives:
Had family staying in the adjacent room prior to our arrival who told us that there was a drunken domestic dispute that they had to call security numerous times to resolve. When we walked into that room, there was still mystery liquid splashed on the sofa bed, wall, and curtains. My wife found two shards of glass in the carpet and I found three more. I called the front desk, who sent someone up with a vacuum cleaner, and even then, my wife saw thick dust on the corner edges of the carpet. Other random areas were obviously not dusted or cleaned regularly. Not a great environment for our 3-year-old, nor what you'd expect for the price per night of a king suite. There was some gangbanger-looking guy puffing on a cigarette each time we pulled up to the carport, with nobody enforcing the non-smoking sign. 

The housekeeping staff themselves routinely blocked the two elevators, or used them for their cleaning carts--I guess the property doesn't have staff or industrial lifts? The elevators were already completely insufficient to manage the volume of guests, and we frequently waited up to 5 minutes for an elevator with space. Despite booking.com reporting that breakfast is available, all food must be purchased through their in-hotel pub, which charges an average of $15 per (small) entree. 

Finally, we abruptly needed to leave the hotel a day early, and told them 36 hours in advance. They told us to contact booking.com, who told us to ask the hotel for approval. The hotel stressed contacting booking.com. I called b.com's customer support, who called the property, who denied my request for a partial refund. They acted like they were powerless to enforce

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Did not stay at property cancelled reservation cannot get my refund because cannot get a representative from either party to call each other to confirm the reservation was cancelled and approved even though i sent several emails from the property and from booking. Noone will call each other. Im out 266. And  never stayed there. I'm calling better business bureau
reviews.negatives: Never stayed at property

reviews.title: I’m never booking here again
reviews.positives: I was close to the shopping plaza that I wanted to visit. A few of the front desk employees were very nice.
reviews.negatives: I had to switch rooms multiple times due to mold issues in 2 rooms and spiders. The last room I had the heat didn’t work and I receive iron infusion this was not good for me health wise.

reviews.title: Don’t stay
reviews.positives: It was clean
reviews.negatives: The staff.  The toilet was clogged.  I paid $400 to unclog it myself.

reviews.title: I was very uncomfortable. I came all the way from Myrtle Beach, South Carolina to New York for a family function
reviews.positives: It was close to the event we attended
reviews.negatives: I was told I could check in and the girl was so rude and nasty threating my daughter she wasn’t professional at all

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The bed that’s it!!!
reviews.negatives: The room stunk the ac didn’t work right.

reviews.title: On business?  Stay somewhere else!
reviews.positives: Not sure
reviews.negatives: No idea, they never replied.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: My card was charged twice I still have not gotten my refund

reviews.title: Try somewhere else
reviews.negatives: Room locks didn’t work and furniture was filthy

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location was good for where I needed to go
reviews.negatives: Staff was careless and did not provide promised and paid for services. We showed up to dirty sheets and not enough towels. Had to make our own beds and never received room service during our stay. We requested 1 day for room service of our 4 days there, they failed to provide. The rooms was full of staining on the furniture and walls, it made it all feel gross.

reviews.title: Not what I expected for what I paid
reviews.positives: The location was great for what I had to do
reviews.negatives: Beds were extremely uncomfortable and the sheets were dirty red marks was not pleasant

reviews.title: The accommodations were comfortable but having to repeatedly ask for my room to be tidied and clean towels to be provide
reviews.positives: It was close to my relatives. The accommodations were comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
I did not like having to repeatedly ask for housekeeping. I was asked if I wanted housekeeping on my arrival. I said yes  but did not receive it the next day or the day after. After repeated requests, housekeeping came on the 3rd night of my stay. 
I also did not know that a continental breakfast would not be provided.  I guess  that is my fault as I assumed that would be the case as I have stayed at a Courtyard by Marriott hotel on numerous occasions in the past and enjoyed the opportunity to grab a muffin or bagel etc and coffee.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The beds were good.
reviews.negatives:
First off all: the rooms are not at all soundproof. We could hear all that was said in the hallway and in the rooms next to us and all that was done above us (all night long...). This hotel seems to have its walls made of cardboard. Not what I would expect, as it seems to be a recent build.
Other disappointing issues: toilet clogged, molt in shower, no soap in the bathroom, pool heating broken (sorry, you are welcome to swim, but the water is just freezing cold), airco in room broken, long lines for breakfast and dirty breakfast area, no cups at coffee maker in the room, no cups at water dispenser. 
In general, it seems like the management does not care too much about service or hospitality. The housekeeping and breakfast staff are working hard, and they try to do a good job, but 2 people to do breakfast? Take orders, clean tables, make the orders, clean the dishes; it is just too much. 
The guys behind the check-in desk nearby did not step in for a second. One sat jawning at his desk. Seemed to be having the 'not in my job description' mentality.
For a Marriott hotel (price per night $500,- for a 2nd floor King room), it was very disappointing.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Dirty bathroom and linens

reviews.title: Overpriced and disappointed, had higher expectations for a Marriott
reviews.positives: Breakfast and coffee very overpriced but were good. Staff was nice. Nice area with couches and fire pit outside but did not get a chance to use at night.
reviews.negatives: Had to switch rooms due to running toilet and room being dirty. Mattress cover did not fit bed, when pulled back to make bed there were long black hairs in between mattress and cover.  Disgusting to say the least.  Second room walked in room and immediately saw blood on bed on sheets inside and out. They wrote it off as the maid had cut herself while cleaning. Next room was very dusty, could write my name in it, and still disappointed. Was tired of complaining and moving so spent last night in dusty room looking at a roof!!

reviews.title: We were ripped off
reviews.positives: It was a beautiful building
reviews.negatives: We did not get complementary breakfast it was not offered.

reviews.title: A little disappointed, I asked for extra pillows when making reservation and never got them. I stated there 2 weeks prio
reviews.positives: Convenient location
reviews.negatives: A little dirty outside and we didn’t have enough toilet paper

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.positives: I like that it was close to the   House I need to go Toto support my family in the passing of my niece.
reviews.negatives: I called to check on my reservation end date and was told I was ok to stay another night as planned in my stay but was unsure because of all that was going on with me and my family and when I got back from the fur wrap was charged and extra day I explained this to the gentleman at the front desk and he didn’t care about it I told him that I would leave but I would have to sleep in my car but he insisted it was ok and told me the price and I hope my bank account is not overdrawn because it was an unexpected change due to the fact I only had enough to pay for my original stay I’m disabled and I wouldn’t have been able to sleep in my car comfortably but I didn’t want to have to pay for another night. But hopefully I will be able to fix it with my bank they said they tried to call me but was calling the wrong number and the phone in the room didn’t work.

reviews.title: The only real issue was when the Pepsi truck hit the overhang and set the alarm off and water flowing under the overhang

With the high rates coffee should be offered in the lobby/lounge area not sold. Also asked for and extra pillow and was told there were none.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives:
DO NOT book a LONG STAY at this hotel THROUGH BOOKING.COM! 
I made a month log reservation through booking.com and after having multiple random pending charges plus one huge charge to my card I discovered that Booking have made multiple bookings for my single booking for reasons known to booking.com only. This left me to deal with a $2000 unexpected charge that 2 weeks after checking out I'm still struggling to get back.

reviews.title: The only downside to my stay was a family in the room next to me were very load and had small children running all night

reviews.title: Bistro ruined my short stay.
reviews.positives: Clean. Looks updated.
reviews.negatives: Bistro was the worst food ever. Soups were cold, not even warm. Sent back, couldn't eat as tasted like tomato sauce for pasta. The grilled cheese sandwich was horrible, and I didn't eat either. 2 sandwiches,2 soups, and 1 whiskey sour for $50+. I had to go out to eat after a 7 hour drive.

reviews.title: Comfortable but noisy.
reviews.positives: The bed was very comfortable, the rooms were clean, the staff were friendly and efficient.
reviews.negatives: We were in room 107 on the main floor and it was next to a utility closet. Someone made a racket there, and there were people making a lot of noise in the lobby in the mornings.

reviews.title: Great place to stay while visiting family

reviews.title: Good luck chasing down whoever smokes weed in the building.  This is a non-smoking facility.
reviews.positives: Check-in was efficient and exceeded our expectations with an early check-in. Our room was properly prepared/clean and your staff both in housekeeping, front desk and bistro/lounge were courteous.
reviews.negatives: We stayed on the 4th floor/west end of of building.  While our room was properly prepared, the hallway stunk of weed/pot/cannabis smoke on the morning of our departure.  We advised front desk staff about this on departure, who seemed eager to investigate the issue.  Phone number listed on booking.com is also for sister hotel across the parking lot - this created confusion when calling the hotel.

reviews.title: Good for the price
reviews.positives: I liked how clean the room was. The shower was great, it had everything. The TV had netflix / lots of cable channels.
reviews.negatives: The matress wasn’t great, and we stayed in the first floor. Although it was pretty quiet, you could hear every time someone flushed their toilet upstairs.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: I recently stayed at this hotel and had a wonderful experience from start to finish. The staff was friendly, professional, and made sure everything was taken care of. The room was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with everything I needed. The amenities were great, and the location was convenient. Everything went smoothly, and I truly had no complaints. I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to others looking for a pleasant and hassle-free stay.
reviews.negatives: My only small suggestion would be to consider providing complimentary bottled water in the room, which would have been a nice touch.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The pool and gym were clean and new. The hotel room was renovated, and the breakfast/ Starbucks was a nice surprise. Also, the lobby had a few private sitting areas with TVs which were nice to gather with friends and watch a sports game.
reviews.negatives: The room had dirty towels and the hvac system was loud which didn't allow for much rest.

reviews.positives: The rooms were very nice & well appointed. The bed was comfortable. The sofa in the room was interesting. As it was very deep & that made it uncomfortable for me to sit on & relax as I am only 5 ft tall. The shower & bathroom are wonderful. We missed breakfast all days we were there so I cannot comment on that.
reviews.negatives: We settled into the room & were getting ready to go to a family Christmas party. During this time we saw a large live spider in the bathroom & also the live small cockroach that was in the bed. We called the front desk about it and were moved to another room. It was a pain to repack up everything while getting ready but we appreciated the prompt room change. The front desk gentleman helped us move our stuff. That room was bug free!!!

reviews.negatives:
There was a new waitress on our first night.  I ordered chicken quesadilla, and I ordered a turkey with a bacon club sandwich for my husband.  My quesadilla was left too long in the toasteroven fried and chard. The new waitress thought it was fine for me to consume.  Then she brought a grill cheese and tomato soup for my husband and said that was her favorite meal, he'd like it. I said, but I never ordered that she said well I can show you the receipt. Smh.. the receipt which she wrote up.  Nonetheless, my husband liked his meal. I wasn't very happy and we ate out after that. 
Redemption a long day and different waitress we order dinner and both enjoyed our meal and service.
Training takes time, as does learning but never decides what a customer should eat and never fabricate what a customer says as we never forget such things.

La alfombra en las habitaciones y la del pasillo están sucias.

reviews.title: Buena pero con algunas decepciones en aseo y comida......
reviews.positives: Habitación bonita y cómoda. Instalaciones del Hotel buenas en general.
reviews.negatives: La limpieza, no era la mejor. Ademas el día que llegamos no nos avisaron que teníamos que indicar que hicieran y limpiaran la habitación....... Cuando llegamos en la noche la habitación seguían sin hacer y sin limpiar. Cuando la tomamos había basura de los anteriores huéspedes. Ademas según oferta de Booking contemplaba desayuno y no me fije y no me incluyeron cuando reserve.....

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Me gustó todo limpio muy cómodo

reviews.title: Todo bien gracias 🙏🏻
reviews.positives: La comodida de las habitaciones  y

reviews.title: Na
reviews.positives: El lugar es muy bonito todo muy acogedor
reviews.negatives: No tenia desayuno por el precio q uno paga aparte q el de la recepcion era muy grocero se porto muy grocero y sarcastico solo por verme hispanp y q solo pague una noche

reviews.title: Si vous aimez les Marriots, evitez les Courtyard au risque d’être déçu
reviews.positives: L’emplacement, la literie, la propreté
reviews.negatives:
D’avoir réservé pour 3 adultes avec petit déjeuné et devoir se battre à la réception pour les avoir (enfin pas tout à fait, nous avons eu 2adultes et 1 enfant…)
Le bruit de la climatisation, même éteinte

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Lits confortables
reviews.negatives: Un seul petit déjeuner compté alors que j'avais réservé pour 2 adultes et 1 enfant

reviews.title: Hotel ok, aber Preis Leistung passt nicht wenn man trotz mitgebuchtemFrühstück sein Frühstück bezahlen soll
reviews.positives: Sauberkeit
reviews.negatives:
Wir hatten mit Frühstück gebucht, gab aber nur Kaffee, den Rest hätte man bezahlen müssen, so stellen wir uns kein gebuchtes Frühstück vor!!! 
Wir hatten auf unserer Reise viele verschiedene Hotels immer mit Frühstück gebucht und auch immer erhalten außer in diesem Hotel!

reviews.title: Ok für eine Nacht
reviews.positives: Zimmer und Bad gut und sauber.
reviews.negatives: Laute Klimaanlage, Atmosphäre beim Frühstück: Umfang genau definiert: einen Kaffee und abgezählte Speisen pro Person.

reviews.title: Was man bucht, sollte man auch bekommen?!
reviews.positives:
Große Zimmer, großer Parkplatz 
Grillplatz uns Sitzecke im Garten
reviews.negatives:
Wurde mit kostenlosen Frühstück gebucht, dies gab es nur für zwei Personen (statt der gebuchten 4 Pers.)
Zimmer sind sehr hellhörig.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die gemütlichen Sitzmöglichkeiten draußen an der Feuerstelle.
reviews.negatives: Räume alle sehr stark gekühlt, selbst im Schwimmbad.

reviews.title: Zentrales Hotel für Inselerkundung
reviews.positives: Nettes Hotel - man braucht aber ein Auto um wo hin zu kommen.
reviews.negatives: Nachdem das Zusatzbett ausgezogen war, war nur mehr sehr wenig Platz.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Comodo per visitare Long Island. Disponibilità del parcheggio.
reviews.negatives:
Il servizio in camera veniva fatto solo su espressa richiesta. Il primo giorno non l'hanno fatto e abbiamo dovuto ricordarlo 3 volte.
La colazione non era inclusa (anche se su Booking era scritto così).

reviews.title: Óptimo Hotel para estadias curtas em Islip-Long Island
reviews.positives: Hotel confortável na zona de Islip - Long Island. Quartos amplos e confortáveis. Parque de Estacionamento gratuito.

reviews.title: それなりかな。
reviews.positives: 夕食のハンバーグが値段の割に美味しかった。ローカルビールも美味しかった。
reviews.negatives: ドライヤーが壊れていた（シャワーあがりに使おうとしたが、壊れていたのに気づくものの、裸なので電話をかけて持って来させるのを諦めた。また、洗面所の排水性が悪かった。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 早めのチェックインでしたが、特別料金もなくチェックインできたこと。
reviews.negatives: エレベータの調子が良くなかった。洗面所に石鹸がないので、クレームを言って持ってきてもらったこと。セキュリティーボックスがなく、貴重品を常に持ち歩かなければなかったこと。

reviews.title: 舒适自然
reviews.positives: 床和枕头舒服
reviews.negatives: 冷气噪音大了点。

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Hosszan nyitva tartó medence, kerti kiülő-hely.  
Tágas szoba kényelmes ágyakkal. Figyelmes és kedves személyzet a recepciónál és a bárban is. Elegendő számú ingyenes parkoló.
reviews.negatives: A szobai hűtőszekrény nagyon kicsi.

reviews.title: Overall the room service is quite good & the staff is quite helpful
reviews.positives: The environment is quite peaceful
reviews.negatives: Some noise

reviews.title: Underwhelming
reviews.positives: The staff made the stay!
reviews.negatives:
The value was really shocking. Charging a £200 per night almost for a middle of nowhere 3 star hotel is quite outrageous.
The staff were lovely and made the stay hit the building is in very poor condition. The smell of bleach and disinfectant is nauseatingly overwhelming however, I do understand why. 
The marks on the carpets, chips in dirt other, peeling of walls and bath fixtures is really off putting.
It just is not worth the money and with no breakfast included for London prices is quite unfair.
Our sitcom unit sounded like it was going to lift off when it was turned on. It should be no more than £100 per night. Stating there is a gym and pool shouldn’t bump the price up for this establishment as neither are well presented.
A very underwhelming stay for the price and it is unfairly advertised by yourselves.

reviews.title: Disappointed by the hotel.
reviews.negatives:
We got a 3rd floor room above large garbage containers. The hotel was by no means full!
No paper seal as proof of cleanliness of the toilet

reviews.title: Was not happy
reviews.positives: Spending time with my family however, I never ordered a disable room and should mot be given that room.
reviews.negatives: I was given a disabled room which the bathroom was up to me or my wife's standard. The water that runs out the shower ran directly on the floor and my son fell, I want my money refunded due to this accident that could've been avoided if the front desk person would've cared.

reviews.title: Very disappointed—avoid!
reviews.positives: Nothing of note
reviews.negatives:
Lots!!
Remote!!
Room was not what I expected.
Roll out bed dreadful—super thin mattress/unstable/weird shape.
Staff not at all helpful—in fact didn’t care at all as far as I could see.
Closet handle broken in bedroom,water flow from tap awful bed shabby and a weird stick out base.
The list is really endless—I would not recommend here —the worst American hotel I ever stayed in.

reviews.title: Poor stay!
reviews.negatives:
The staff was not interested in service!

The outside area in the back should be cleaner and more comfortable!
It seems no one want to have a guest outside!

reviews.title: The stay was quite comfortable. If we visit again, we will stay in the same hotel.
reviews.positives: The size of the room.  The bathroom was nice. No disturbance by cleaning staff.
reviews.negatives: On check-in, there was no water to drink in the room. A couple of bottles could have been put in the room or the reception could have told us. Had to go back to the lobby and get it. The coffee sold in the lobby was at room temperature. The staff there do not seem to know that when one of the 2 coffees bought is a decaf, they should mark it on the glass. A complementary breakfast would have been nice.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Lots of noise

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room was extremely comfortable.
reviews.negatives: For the room price,  breakfast should be included.

reviews.title: This hotel is in safe and quiet location with very nice amenities not found at other area hotels.
reviews.positives: It was very clean. The Bistro serving breakfast and a few items and drinks in the evening was a great convenience. There was a fire pit, heated indoor pool and gym, and ample parking.
reviews.negatives: The walls and ceilings did not block the sound of neighboring guests.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Great location and clean
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Nice hotel for a nights stay. Thumbs up on upkeep and cleanliness.
reviews.positives: Finally a hotel where cleanliness is given the attention that should be standard.
reviews.negatives: Room appliances and a/c could have been a bit quieter but didn’t prevent me from getting to sleep.

reviews.title: Excellent Accommodations
reviews.positives: I chose this hotel because I was having surgery in a nearby hospital and I live in another state.  The hotel was exceptionally clean, quiet and comfortable.  It was a great place to recuperate.  As it turned out, surgery went well and I did not need the room for the two nights I booked it.  The manager was kind and considerate and upon explaining my situation, he refunded one night so that I could check out early.
reviews.negatives: I did not like the food at the on-site restaurant.  Service was excellent but the quality of the food could be better.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Im really happy about how clean it was and everything very convenient.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.positives: Lovely room, and very comfortable bed. Bathroom was a good size and clean, lovely big shower enclosure. Staff were lovely.
